docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,580.00 FILED BY GUILLORY, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT PUCKETT, BARBARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUILLORY, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUCKETT, BARBARA $895.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $945.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PUCKETT, BARBARA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED SEP-07-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PUCKETT, BARBARA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2012 - JUDGMENT.
